What We Offer

Our Signature Events

Click any service tag to see our real work. Every event designed uniquely — no templates, only your vision.

Birthday Celebrations

Princess themes, balloon arches, LED name boards, cake setups — every birthday becomes a fairy tale at Sujatha Events.

🔍 View Birthday Photos

Wedding & Marriage Events

Grand mandap decorations, floral arrangements, stage setups, lighting & full wedding planning — traditional & modern themes.

🔍 View Wedding Photos

Haldi Ceremonies

Marigold backdrops, lotus setups, peacock props, banana leaf décor — authentic traditional ambiance to bless the couple.

🔍 View Haldi Photos

Smoke & Fog Effects

Cinematic dry ice cloud effects for first dance, cake cutting & grand entrances — magical moments guests remember forever.

🔍 View Smoke Photos

Engagement Ceremonies

Floral backdrops, LED name boards, white floral stages, photo booths & coordinated catering for a perfect ring ceremony.

🔍 View Engagement Photos

Baby Showers & More

Banana leaf & marigold backdrops, mother silhouette cutouts, flower garland swags — beautiful traditional baby shower setups.

🔍 View Baby Shower Photos
